data.title: TornadoCash developer Alexey Pertsev allowed to be released from prison on February 7 and put on electronic monitoring
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Alexey Pertsev’s statement, the Dutch court has approved the suspension of his pre-trial detention. He will be released at 10:00 on February 7, but he will be subject to electronic monitoring.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 97,000 USDT with a 1.11% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 06, 2025, 15:48 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 97,000 USDT and is now trading at 96,982 USDT, with a narrowed 1.11% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has exploded more than 40 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 40.6487 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 38.8958 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 1.7529 million US dollars.

data.title: Greeks.live: Options market data shows that the market is weakening, and the market outlook in February is not optimistic
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live analyst Adam posted on the X platform: "BTC has seen a large number of put option block trades today, with a nominal value of $600 million accounting for a quarter of the total trades. Tonight alone, two bearish calendars are worth $110 million. The market is weakening, and confidence is also declining. The short-term Skew is close to 0, and the medium- and long-term Skew and IV have also fallen significantly. The market outlook for February is not optimistic. There are still a large number of altcoins waiting to be unlocked in the first quarter, and the market is currently short of funds."

data.title: Lido: V3 version is coming soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Lido published a post on the X platform revealing that the V3 version will be launched soon.

data.title: Arbitrum Ambassador Program to Expand to South Korea and Brazil in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Arbitrum Ambassador Program will expand to South Korea and Brazil in 2025. Both countries have shown community participation and brought value to the Arbitrum ecosystem. It is reported that the program will be restarted in 2024, focusing on three key regions: India, Nigeria and Mexico.

data.title: Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust Fund Asset Management Scale Reaches $4 Billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Grayscale announced on the X platform that the asset management scale of the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF has reached US$4 billion.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Sees Modest Gains Amid Mixed Performance
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index experienced a slight increase, closing at 3248.93, marking a 0.4% rise or an addition of 14.12 points since 4 p.m. on Wednesday. This index, which is widely traded across various platforms and regions worldwide, reflects the performance of a diverse range of digital assets.

Out of the 20 assets included in the index, eleven showed positive movement. Leading the gains were Stellar (XLM) with a 1.5% increase and Litecoin (LTC) with a 1.3% rise. These assets contributed significantly to the overall upward trend observed in the index.

Conversely, some assets underperformed, with Aptos (APT) declining by 1.0% and Uniswap (UNI) falling by 0.8%. These laggards slightly offset the gains made by the leaders, resulting in a modest overall increase for the CoinDesk 20 Index. The mixed performance highlights the dynamic nature of the digital asset market, where fluctuations are common and can be influenced by a variety of factors.

data.title: Foundry Expands Operations With Rootstock Merge Mining
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, Foundry, the leading Bitcoin mining pool by hashrate, has announced its strategic move to diversify operations by enhancing the security of the Bitcoin layer-2 network, Rootstock, through merge mining. This approach allows miners to mine multiple cryptocurrencies using the same hashing algorithm without affecting mining efficiency.

The initiative introduces 740 exahashes per second to secure Rootstock transactions, which accounts for approximately 80% of the total computing power currently safeguarding the Bitcoin network. This development presents a new revenue stream for Foundry, as Bitcoin mining pools that engage in merge mining can earn 79% of Rootstock’s transaction fees, paid in rBTC, while utilizing their existing Bitcoin mining infrastructure.

By adopting merge mining, Foundry not only strengthens Rootstock’s security but also does so without incurring additional energy costs. This contributes to a more resilient and innovative Bitcoin ecosystem. Rootstock, a Bitcoin layer-2 network, enhances the network's security while integrating smart contract functionality and compatibility with the Ethereum Virtual Machine.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based BERA perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 75 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based BERA perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 75 times. Contract strategy trading will be opened simultaneously.
